UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user preferences and basic identity for the companion.

preferredName.description: How the user wants to be called.

comfortStyle.description: How the user prefers to be comforted.

Character.title: Character
Character.description: The persona and settings of the AI companion.

RelationState.title: Relation State
RelationState.description: Tracks the evolving relationship between the user and the AI.

relationStage.description: Current stage (e.g., 陌生, 了解, 熟悉, 知己/爱人).

Moment.title: Moment
Moment.description: A social media style post from the character.

MemoryItem.title: Memory Item
MemoryItem.description: A high-value structured memory extracted from conversations.

summary.description: A concise summary of the memory.

keyphrase.description: A short phrase for quick indexing.

SessionSnapshot.title: Session Snapshot
SessionSnapshot.description: A summary of the last interaction to facilitate natural re-entry.

lastScene.description: The context of the last conversation.

lastEmotion.description: The user's emotion at the end of the session.

unfinishedTopic.description: A topic that was left hanging.

followupHint.description: A hint for the AI to naturally restart the conversation.

/users/{userId}/characters/{characterId}.description: Custom characters created by the user.

/users/{userId}/chats/{chatId}/relation/.description: The relationship state for this chat.

/users/{userId}/chats/{chatId}/memories/.description: Individual memory items for this chat.

/users/{userId}/chats/{chatId}/moments/{.description: Social media posts from the character.

/users/{userId}/chats/{chatId}/snapshots.description: The most recent session snapshot for this chat.
